name: AMERICAS CARMART INC
headquarters: Texas (incorporated), operations primarily in South-Central United States
summary: Americas Car-Mart, Inc. is a publicly held automotive retailer focused exclusively on the Integrated Auto Sales and Finance segment of the used car market. Operating through subsidiaries Car-Mart of Arkansas and Colonial Auto Finance, the Company sells older model used vehicles and provides in-house financing to customers with limited credit histories. As of April 30, 2025, it operated 154 dealerships primarily in small cities throughout the South-Central United States.
